reviews.comment:
Espectacular atención en el servicompras.Me atendieron a cuerpo de rey!!Una hermosa empleada en todo sentido cuando le pedí unas empanadas y me dijo no hay..pero no se preocupe enseguida le cocino.Wow no lo podía creer Riquísimas empanadas Excelente atención y lo lindo que la excelente persona que me atendió tiene pasión por las motos y viajar..espero se le concreten sus viajes con la Corven que me dijo que manejaba y ya le hizo 4000 kms .Gracias gracias por la atencion

(Translated by Google)
Spectacular service at the convenience store. They treated me like royalty! A wonderful employee in every way. When I asked for empanadas and she said they didn't have any, she said, "Don't worry, I'll cook them for you right away." Wow, I couldn't believe it! Delicious empanadas! Excellent service, and it's great that the wonderful person who served me is passionate about motorcycles and traveling. I hope she has many trips planned with the Corven she mentioned she rides and has already put 4,000 km on it. Thank you, thank you for your attention!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvak5uektnEAE
